div.head:
No. 620
Editorial Note
div.p: The Foreign Ministers of the United States, France, and the United Kingdom met in London from October 16 through October 18 to discuss a proposal for a Four-Power meeting with the Soviet Union. Concerning these talks, as well as bilateral talks between the United States and French officials on other issues such as Indochina and EDC, see the editorial note, volume V, Part 2, page 1709.
